creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
Thank you! Already building endless-sky from your tree.

I am happy to have rather decent building server at home and would be glad to help with building/testing things. I like to build (was on Gentoo for about 5 years!) :)
And libre software games on FreeBSD is a worthy cause to help the community with.

I just have little experience in testing games and have no nvidia card, AMD only.
So, how could I help you?
